# go-term benchmark baseline
# go test -bench=. -count=5 -benchmem ./term
# Each line: Name  NsPerOp  BytesPerOp  AllocsPerOp
BenchmarkVisualReorder_FullRow 12337 22552 69
BenchmarkVisualReorder_AllLTR 599 0 0
BenchmarkSixel_Decode 13424 49344 5
BenchmarkGrid_InsertLines 1224 0 0
BenchmarkGrid_DeleteLines 1057 0 0
BenchmarkResize_Reflow_DeepScrollback 15525296 90451238 31155
BenchmarkGrid_ScrollUpRegion_FullScreen 3125 0 0
BenchmarkGrid_ScrollDownRegion_FullScreen 2585 0 0
BenchmarkGrid_Search 56154 0 0
BenchmarkGrid_Search_LargeScrollback 8546 24 1
BenchmarkParserFeed_PlainText 95183 0 0
BenchmarkParserFeed_SGR 46082 0 0
BenchmarkScrollback_EnsureGeom 210232 2893312 4
BenchmarkForegroundPass 54606 0 0
